content:
To find the minimum possible value for $|p(15)|$, we'll use the given information to express $p(15)$. 

First, let's find the value of the polynomial $p(x)$ at $x = 5$ and $x = 25$ using the given information:
$p(5) = 125a + 25b + 5c + d$
$p(25) = 15625a + 625b + 25c + d$

Since we know that $p(5) + p(25) = 1906$, we can rewrite the equation above as:
$p(5) + p(25) = 1906$
$(125a + 25b + 5c + d) + (15625a + 625b + 25c + d) = 1906$
Combine like terms:
$15750a + 650b + 30c + 2d = 1906$

To isolate $p(15)$, we need to express the polynomial $p(x)$ at $x = 15$:
$p(15) = 3375a + 225b + 15c + d$

Now, in order to apply the given condition on $p(5) + p(25)$ to $p(15)$, let's apply some algebra and express the relationship between $p(5 + 10) = p(15)$ and $p(5) + p(25)$. We can observe that $p(5 + 10) = p(15)$ is a third degree and $p(5) + p(25)$ is a third degree polynomial. Since we can't get an exact formula, we can notice that $15^3=3375=5^3\times 3^3=3(5^3\cdot 3^3-3\cdot5^3)=3(5^3(3^3-5)).$

Applying the same method we can find the expression $5^3 + 25^3 = 5^3  + (5^2 \cdot 5^1)^3 = 5^3 (1^3+5^2 \cdot 5^1)=5^3 (1+5\cdot 5).$

Now, let's substitute these expressions in the equation:
\begin{align*}
|15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |a\cdot(5^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3) + b\cdot (5^2 + 5^2 \cdot k_3) + c\cdot (5 + 5\cdot k_3) + d| \\
|15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |a(5^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3) + 5^2 \cdot b (1+k_3) + 5 \cdot c\cdot(1 + k_3)(5) + d| \\
|15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |a(5^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3)) + 5^2\cdot b + 5\cdot (1+k_3)\cdot5 \cdot c + d| \end{align*}

Let's introduce a polynomial $q(x) = ax^3 + bx^2 + cx + d$, then 
 $|15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| = |q(5^3+k_3 \cdot 5^3)+5^2b+ 5\cdot (k_3 + 5)\cdot 5\cdot c+ d|.$
As $(q(5) + q(25)) = 1906,$ we can get the following expression
\begin{align*}
|15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) + 5^2b + 5\cdot (1+k_3 )5\cdot c + d| \\
&= |q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3)+(5^2+25^2)/2\cdot b + 5\cdot (k_3\cdot 5^2+5^2 + 25^2) \cdot c |
\end{align*}
Now, by applying the following properties of absolute value function $$|n+m|\geq \left|\frac{n+m}{2}\right| - \left|\frac{n+m}{2}\right|,$$
we can find the  following:
$$\left |\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) + \frac14(5^2+25^2) \cdot b + 5 \cdot c\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25)\right |+ \left |\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) - \frac14(5^2+25^2) \cdot b - 5 \cdot c\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25)\right| \ge |15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3|.$$ Since $|ab|=|a||b|,$ and that $|m+n|\ge |m|+|n|,$ then 
\begin{align*}
\left |q(5^3+k_3 \cdot 5^3) + 5^2 \cdot b + 5\cdot(1+k_3) \cdot 5 \cdot c + d\right| &\ge \left |\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) + \frac14(5^2+25^2) \cdot b + 5 \cdot c\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25)\right| + \left |\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) - \frac14(5^2+25^2) \cdot b - 5 \cdot c\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25)\right|\\
&= \frac12\left|\frac 12 q(5^3+k_3\cdot5^3)+5^2 \cdot b+ 5\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25)c+d\right | + \frac 12\left |\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot5^3)- 5^2\cdot b - 5\cdot (5^2(k_3+5)+25)c+d\right| \ge |15^3+5^3\cdot k_3|,\end{align*}and equality is possible when
$$\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) =\frac14(5^2+25^2) \cdot b + 5 \cdot c\cdot (5^2(k_3+5)+25).$$
Let's use  $b=-1575 \cdot (5^3 + 5^3 \cdot k_3)$ and $c=-1500 \cdot(5^2 + 5^2 \cdot k_3),$ then
\begin{align*}
    |15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) + 5^2b + 5\cdot (1+k_3 )5\cdot c + d| \\
    &= \left|q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3)+5^2\cdot (-1575 \cdot (1+k_3 \cdot 5^3)) + 5\cdot(-1500\cdot (5^2+(5^2\cdot (1+k_3))) + d\right|\\
    &=\left|-5^3\cdot (3+3k_3)(1575+1500)+ d\right|\\
     &= |-5^3\cdot (3+3k_3)\cdot 3075 + d|.\end{align*}

Now let's substitute $(q(5^3+k_3\cdot 5^3)) =\frac14(5^2+25^2)\cdot (-1575\cdot5^3\cdot k_3)+\frac{5\cdot(1+5^3\cdot k_3)}{2}\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25),$ the equation above becomes 
$\begin{align*}
    |15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |-5^3\cdot (3+3k_3)(1575+1500)+ d|\\
    &= |-5^3\cdot (3+3k_3)\cdot 3075+d|\\
 &= |-3\cdot5^3(1+k_3)(1+5\cdot 10^2)+ d|\\
    &= \left| -3\cdot(1+k_3)25^3 + d \right|\\
    &= |25^3(-3 - 3\cdot k_3) + d|\\
    &= \left|-3\cdot25^ 2 (25 + 25\cdot k_3)+d\right|\\
   &= |-3\cdot 25^2 \cdot (25\cdot(1 + (1+k_3))) + d|\\
   &= -3\cdot 25^2 \cdot (25 + 25 + 25\cdot k_3 )+d| \\
   &= |-3\cdot25^2 \cdot (2\cdot25+25\cdot k_3)+ d|
   & =|- 3^2 \cdot 5^4 \cdot 2 (1+ k_3)| + d |\\
 &= |- 3^2 \cdot 5^5\cdot  1\cdot 2\cdot 25 + d|\\
 &= |- 3

message.content:
To find the minimum possible value for $|p(15)|$, we'll use the given information to express $p(15)$. 

First, let's find the value of the polynomial $p(x)$ at $x = 5$ and $x = 25$ using the given information:
$p(5) = 125a + 25b + 5c + d$
$p(25) = 15625a + 625b + 25c + d$

Since we know that $p(5) + p(25) = 1906$, we can rewrite the equation above as:
$p(5) + p(25) = 1906$
$(125a + 25b + 5c + d) + (15625a + 625b + 25c + d) = 1906$
Combine like terms:
$15750a + 650b + 30c + 2d = 1906$

To isolate $p(15)$, we need to express the polynomial $p(x)$ at $x = 15$:
$p(15) = 3375a + 225b + 15c + d$

Now, in order to apply the given condition on $p(5) + p(25)$ to $p(15)$, let's apply some algebra and express the relationship between $p(5 + 10) = p(15)$ and $p(5) + p(25)$. We can observe that $p(5 + 10) = p(15)$ is a third degree and $p(5) + p(25)$ is a third degree polynomial. Since we can't get an exact formula, we can notice that $15^3=3375=5^3\times 3^3=3(5^3\cdot 3^3-3\cdot5^3)=3(5^3(3^3-5)).$

Applying the same method we can find the expression $5^3 + 25^3 = 5^3  + (5^2 \cdot 5^1)^3 = 5^3 (1^3+5^2 \cdot 5^1)=5^3 (1+5\cdot 5).$

Now, let's substitute these expressions in the equation:
\begin{align*}
|15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |a\cdot(5^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3) + b\cdot (5^2 + 5^2 \cdot k_3) + c\cdot (5 + 5\cdot k_3) + d| \\
|15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |a(5^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3) + 5^2 \cdot b (1+k_3) + 5 \cdot c\cdot(1 + k_3)(5) + d| \\
|15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |a(5^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3)) + 5^2\cdot b + 5\cdot (1+k_3)\cdot5 \cdot c + d| \end{align*}

Let's introduce a polynomial $q(x) = ax^3 + bx^2 + cx + d$, then 
 $|15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| = |q(5^3+k_3 \cdot 5^3)+5^2b+ 5\cdot (k_3 + 5)\cdot 5\cdot c+ d|.$
As $(q(5) + q(25)) = 1906,$ we can get the following expression
\begin{align*}
|15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) + 5^2b + 5\cdot (1+k_3 )5\cdot c + d| \\
&= |q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3)+(5^2+25^2)/2\cdot b + 5\cdot (k_3\cdot 5^2+5^2 + 25^2) \cdot c |
\end{align*}
Now, by applying the following properties of absolute value function $$|n+m|\geq \left|\frac{n+m}{2}\right| - \left|\frac{n+m}{2}\right|,$$
we can find the  following:
$$\left |\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) + \frac14(5^2+25^2) \cdot b + 5 \cdot c\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25)\right |+ \left |\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) - \frac14(5^2+25^2) \cdot b - 5 \cdot c\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25)\right| \ge |15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3|.$$ Since $|ab|=|a||b|,$ and that $|m+n|\ge |m|+|n|,$ then 
\begin{align*}
\left |q(5^3+k_3 \cdot 5^3) + 5^2 \cdot b + 5\cdot(1+k_3) \cdot 5 \cdot c + d\right| &\ge \left |\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) + \frac14(5^2+25^2) \cdot b + 5 \cdot c\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25)\right| + \left |\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) - \frac14(5^2+25^2) \cdot b - 5 \cdot c\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25)\right|\\
&= \frac12\left|\frac 12 q(5^3+k_3\cdot5^3)+5^2 \cdot b+ 5\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25)c+d\right | + \frac 12\left |\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot5^3)- 5^2\cdot b - 5\cdot (5^2(k_3+5)+25)c+d\right| \ge |15^3+5^3\cdot k_3|,\end{align*}and equality is possible when
$$\frac 12 q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) =\frac14(5^2+25^2) \cdot b + 5 \cdot c\cdot (5^2(k_3+5)+25).$$
Let's use  $b=-1575 \cdot (5^3 + 5^3 \cdot k_3)$ and $c=-1500 \cdot(5^2 + 5^2 \cdot k_3),$ then
\begin{align*}
    |15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3) + 5^2b + 5\cdot (1+k_3 )5\cdot c + d| \\
    &= \left|q(5^3 + k_3\cdot 5^3)+5^2\cdot (-1575 \cdot (1+k_3 \cdot 5^3)) + 5\cdot(-1500\cdot (5^2+(5^2\cdot (1+k_3))) + d\right|\\
    &=\left|-5^3\cdot (3+3k_3)(1575+1500)+ d\right|\\
     &= |-5^3\cdot (3+3k_3)\cdot 3075 + d|.\end{align*}

Now let's substitute $(q(5^3+k_3\cdot 5^3)) =\frac14(5^2+25^2)\cdot (-1575\cdot5^3\cdot k_3)+\frac{5\cdot(1+5^3\cdot k_3)}{2}\cdot(5^2(k_3+5)+25),$ the equation above becomes 
$\begin{align*}
    |15^3 + 5^3\cdot k_3| &= |-5^3\cdot (3+3k_3)(1575+1500)+ d|\\
    &= |-5^3\cdot (3+3k_3)\cdot 3075+d|\\
 &= |-3\cdot5^3(1+k_3)(1+5\cdot 10^2)+ d|\\
    &= \left| -3\cdot(1+k_3)25^3 + d \right|\\
    &= |25^3(-3 - 3\cdot k_3) + d|\\
    &= \left|-3\cdot25^ 2 (25 + 25\cdot k_3)+d\right|\\
   &= |-3\cdot 25^2 \cdot (25\cdot(1 + (1+k_3))) + d|\\
   &= -3\cdot 25^2 \cdot (25 + 25 + 25\cdot k_3 )+d| \\
   &= |-3\cdot25^2 \cdot (2\cdot25+25\cdot k_3)+ d|
   & =|- 3^2 \cdot 5^4 \cdot 2 (1+ k_3)| + d |\\
 &= |- 3^2 \cdot 5^5\cdot  1\cdot 2\cdot 25 + d|\\
 &= |- 3
